meaning: v.立基于,基于...,以...为基础,vbl.建立,装置
examples: The story is based on fact.
His politics were based on loyal partisanship.
The decision was based upon two considerations.
Aaron, 25, says the Web site has helped Meathead, based in San Luis Obispo, Calif.
From Monday the entire BBC news operation will be based at Broadcasting House in central London.
